transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: I am Officer J. Chen with Metro PD. I am at 780 Elm Street contacting the driver of a white SUV, plate 8XYZ321.

transcript.speaker: David Kowalski
transcript.text: I was coming from Mike's place on 5th. I had a couple drinks.

transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: HGN shows six out of six clues.

transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: Walk and Turn shows four out of eight clues.

transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: The driver remained at the scene beside the white SUV during the investigation.

transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: David Kowalski is placed under arrest for DUI.

transcript.speaker: Officer Chen
transcript.text: At 0154 hours, I advised David Kowalski of Miranda.

transcript.speaker: David Kowalski
transcript.text: I understand and I want a lawyer.
